description: Letter to the Nagid Mevorakh b. Saʿaadya. Small fragment containing the opening and part of the address. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Possibly the same handwriting as ENA NS 70.15 (PGPID 11879) and/or Stras. 4038/9 (PGPID 28970). (Information in part from Yaakov Miller via FGP.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
